message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive E2E tests for hooks command

Introduces end-to-end test coverage for the ntm hooks command, verifying
git hook installation, status checking, and uninstallation workflows.

Test cases:
- TestE2EHooks_Install: validates pre-commit hook installation creates
  executable hook file with correct NTM markers
- TestE2EHooks_Status: tests hooks status command returns correct
  installed/isNTM/hasBackup flags for each hook type
- TestE2EHooks_Uninstall: verifies hook removal and backup restoration
  when existing hook was backed up during install
- TestE2EHooks_InstallWithExisting: tests backup behavior when
  installing over an existing non-NTM hook
- TestE2EHooks_DoubleInstall: verifies idempotent installation doesn't
  corrupt hook or create duplicate backups
- TestE2EHooks_NonGitRepo: validates graceful error handling when run
  outside a git repository

Test infrastructure:
- hookStatusResponse, hookInfo structs for status JSON parsing
- hookInstallResponse, hookUninstallResponse for operation results
- setupHooksTestRepo helper creates temporary git repo with user config
- Uses testutil.RequireE2E and testutil.RequireNTMBinary guards

Hook lifecycle scenarios covered:
1. Clean install in fresh repo
2. Install over existing hook (with backup)
3. Uninstall with backup restore
4. Uninstall without backup (clean removal)
5. Status verification at each lifecycle stage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
